summary: All previously identified issues have been addressed correctly with no new blocking problems introduced.

previous_issues_status.original_issue: CORS allow_origins included wildcards/untrusted domains while allow_credentials=true
previous_issues_status.notes: Now uses an explicit allowlist with specific origins and tightened headers, which is valid for credentialed CORS.

previous_issues_status.original_issue: integration_uri used {proxy} placeholder causing root route failures
previous_issues_status.notes: integration_uri is now the base host, relying on HTTP API path forwarding.

previous_issues_status.original_issue: API mapping stage referenced stage ID instead of stage name
